creator: nevans@talkpoint.com
text:
It looks like the X-BeenThere header has been removed from emails received from the mailing list system on or about May 18th 2021. That header was a handy way of filtering mail from specific lists into dedicated folders without getting into filtering problems with the to or cc fields.

I'm not sure if this is an intentional change or just an oversight. I did not see communication stating this was changing. Is this something that can be restored?
